Fit all windows within 600 px height for small Haiku screens

- Reduced RoastColorWindow tips scroll: 130→70 min, 200→100 max

to accommodate smaller Haiku displays.

commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
fix(attachments): fetch Discord CDN images instead of passing URL directly

Discord CDN URLs are authenticated and expire, so external providers can't
fetch them. Detect cdn.discordapp.com and media.discordapp.net by hostname
and fetch+cache those as raw bytes. Public CDN URLs (Twitter, Instagram, etc.)
are passed by URL as before.

commit.message:
fix: 语义搜索 DB 兼容 — MemoryStoreDB search_text + 中文子串匹配 (#59)

根因：MemoryStoreDB 没有 memory_dir 属性导致 SemanticMemoryIndex 初始化失败，
降级到 Python 侧关键词匹配后 query.split() 对中文无效（中文无空格分词），
整个查询成为一个 token 几乎不可能匹配。

修复：
- MemoryStoreDB.query() 新增 search_text 参数，用 PostgreSQL ILIKE 做子串匹配
- webhook_handlers._semantic_memory_search 降级路径检测 search_text 支持，
  有则委托数据库搜索，否则回退到改进的 Python 侧匹配（中文子串 + 英文分词）
- mcp_server._local_semantic_memory_search 同步修改
- 新增 8 个测试覆盖 search_text SQL 生成 + 中英文降级逻辑

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add priority provider sitemap for indexing acceleration

New sitemap-providers-priority.xml placed FIRST in sitemap index.
Includes up to 49K providers from top 20 most-searched specialties
in large cities (50+ providers). Google crawls earlier sitemaps first,
so this prioritizes the most likely-to-be-searched provider pages.

7M provider pages but only ~5.5K GSC impressions = tiny fraction indexed.
Priority sitemap signals to Google which pages to crawl first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(phase107): create react-loop multi-turn reasoning service

Implements MAX_REACT_ITERATIONS=5 ReAct loop that calls the LLM,
parses tool actions, executes them, injects observations as user
turns, and repeats until no actions remain or limit is reached.
Skips generate_code actions (require HTTP-layer baseUrl injection).
Adds test verifying the full ReactLoopResult shape.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(phase107): wire runReactLoop into agent chat endpoint

Replace single-shot routeChat call with runReactLoop in POST /api/agent/chat.
The loop handles web_search and send_telegram tool calls iteratively (up to 5
iterations), then falls through to generate_code handling with baseUrl injection.
result.reply → result.text, result.latencyMs dropped from response.

Adds 3 integration tests (200 with text, actions shape, 401 without auth).
All 14 phase107 tests pass; full suite 1845/1845 green.

feat(command): `mcx claude` spawn/ls/send/kill/log commands (fixes #176) (#186)

Add CLI surface for Claude Code session management. All commands route
through `callTool` on the `_claude` virtual server — no dedicated IPC
methods needed.

Commands:
- `mcx claude spawn --task "..." [--worktree] [--allow] [--resume]`
- `mcx claude ls [-j]` — table or JSON output
- `mcx claude send <session> <message>` — follow-up prompt
- `mcx claude kill <session>` — interrupt session
- `mcx claude log <session> [--last N]` — view transcript

Session IDs support prefix matching (like git SHAs).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Phase 4: markdown rendering, tool status, permissions, slash commands (#7, #8, #9, #15)

- Markdown rendering for assistant messages with code blocks, headers, lists, inline formatting
- Rich tool execution status with spinners, checkmarks, and result summaries
- Session-scoped permission system with wildcard pattern approval (y/a/n)

refactor: codebase simplification - decompose oversized files, extract services, improve types

Phases:
1. Shared utilities (converters, StarRating, useToast), remove unused deps
2. Library.tsx 2,977→1,366 lines (metadata extractor, import service, 5 modals)
3. database.ts 2,481→223 lines (11 domain repositories, facade pattern)
4. UnifiedReaderContainer.tsx 1,826→1,258 lines (theme sync, search, highlights, TTS)
5. progressService extraction, optimistic annotation updates
6. cloudSyncService split, Firebase directory consolidation
7. console.log cleanup, type safety improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: remove SQLiteDatabase isolated mode (Issue #ARCH-30) (#1010)

* feat(models): introduce Document dataclass, replace TypedDict cast zoo (Issue #ARCH-24)

Introduce a proper Document domain object (@dataclass) that replaces the
scattered TypedDict projections (DocumentRow, DocumentListItem,
RecentDocumentItem, DeletedDocumentItem, ChildDocumentItem,
SupersedeCandidate) with a single type constructed via factory methods.

Phase 1 — Document dataclass (emdx/models/document.py):
- @dataclass(slots=True) with all 15 document fields
- from_row() / from_partial_row() factories with datetime parsing
- __getitem__ / .get() / keys() / items() dict-compat layer
  so all 158 existing bracket-access sites keep working
- to_dict() with datetime→ISO serialization for JSON output
- 31 unit tests covering construction, parsing, compat, serialization

Phase 1b — SearchHit dataclass (emdx/models/search.py):
- Wraps Document + snippet + rank for search results
- Same dict-compat interface with field fallthrough

Phase 2 — Wire into database layer:
- database/documents.py: all functions return Document instead of
  TypedDict casts. Removed _parse_doc_datetimes() (absorbed into
  Document.from_row())
- database/search.py: returns list[SearchHit] instead of
  list[SearchResult]
- database/__init__.py: SQLiteDatabase methods updated to return
  Document / SearchHit
- commands/context.py: switched from DocumentRow to Document

25 cast() calls eliminated. 2068 tests passing, zero breakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: migrate consumers from doc["field"] to doc.field (Issue #ARCH-24)

Phase 3 of the data model refactor — migrate bracket access to attribute
access across 10 consumer files and 9 test files.

Converted files:
- commands/core.py (43 sites — display_save_result, view, edit, delete,
  _find_all, _find_recent, _view_review, _print_view_header_*)
- commands/context.py, history.py, tags.py, tasks.py, wiki.py, gist.py,
  briefing.py, trash.py
- ui/activity/activity_data.py

Updated test mocks to return Document objects instead of raw dicts:
- test_commands_core.py, test_commands_tags.py, test_commands_trash.py,
  test_gist.py, test_v028_regressions.py, test_activity_doc_type.py,
  test_activity_view.py, test_task_commands.py, test_view_review.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: remove 7 obsolete document TypedDicts from database/types.py (Issue #ARCH-24)

Phase 4 — remove DocumentRow, DocumentListItem, RecentDocumentItem,
DeletedDocumentItem, ChildDocumentItem, SupersedeCandidate, and
SearchResult from database/types.py. All replaced by the Document
dataclass and SearchHit in emdx/models/.

Remaining types in database/types.py are non-document structures:
MostViewedDoc, DatabaseStats, DocumentLinkDetail, WikiArticleTimingDict,
StandingQueryRow, StandingQueryMatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(models): Task dataclass replaces TaskDict/EpicTaskDict cast zoo (Issue #ARCH-24)

- Create emdx/models/task.py with Task and TaskLogEntry dataclasses
- Factory methods from_row()/from_partial_row() with datetime parsing
- Dict-compat layer (__getitem__, .get()) for incremental migration
- Wire into models/tasks.py: all functions return Task/TaskLogEntry
- Migrate consumers: commands/tasks.py, ui/task_view.py type annotations
- Fix mypy errors: switch 3 bracket accesses to attribute access
- Remove TaskDict, EpicTaskDict, EpicViewDict, TaskLogEntryDict from types.py
- Update test factories to use Task.from_row()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: revert premature attribute access in task commands/UI (dict compat needed)

Tests mock get_task() with raw dicts, so attribute access like
task.epic_key breaks. Restore bracket access via dict-compat layer
until test mocks are migrated to Task objects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: migrate task test mocks from raw dicts to Task.from_row() (Issue #ARCH-24)

Script-converted 102 mock return values from raw dicts to
Task.from_row()/TaskLogEntry.from_row() so attribute access works
on mock return values. Enables removing dict-compat layer later.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: purge dict-compat layer, add Category dataclass (Issue #ARCH-24)

Remove __getitem__/.get()/keys()/items()/values()/__contains__ from
Document, SearchHit, Task, and TaskLogEntry dataclasses. Convert all
~220 bracket access sites across 26 files to attribute access.

Add Category dataclass replacing CategoryDict/CategoryWithStatsDict
TypedDicts. Wire into categories.py, commands, and tests.

Net -217 lines removed. All 2076 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: convert remaining dict(obj) calls to .to_dict(), fix test mocks (Issue #ARCH-24)

serve.py used dict(doc)/dict(task) which fails without dict-compat.
core.py had one remaining dict(r) on search results.
Test mocks in test_serve.py, test_commands_core.py, and
test_v028_regressions.py still returned raw dicts instead of
SearchHit/Document/Task objects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: remove SQLiteDatabase isolated mode, delete ~300 lines of duplicated SQL (Issue #ARCH-30)

SQLiteDatabase had two modes: global (delegate to canonical functions)
and isolated (self-contained SQL for test databases). The isolated
mode duplicated ~300 lines of SQL that had drifted from the real
implementations (missing filters, FK cleanup, version snapshotting).

Now SQLiteDatabase always delegates to the global functions.
Test isolation is handled by the conftest fixture that swaps the
db_connection singleton. The _conn() staticmethod uses dynamic
import lookup so test fixture swaps are visible at call time.

Rewrote test_sqlite_database.py to use the conftest fixture instead
of creating isolated SQLiteDatabase(db_path) instances.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Feature: mobile responsive layout, student detail page, security hardening, Users/Roster rename

Mobile & responsive:
- Hamburger menu (NavMobileMenu) on top nav for mobile; desktop nav unchanged
- ResizableSidebar auto-collapses on mobile (< 768px) on first visit
- Responsive padding and typography across all student and instructor pages
- CourseEditor: hide drag handles and category dropdowns on mobile
- PeopleManager: card layout on mobile, table on sm+

Roster & student detail:
- Student names in Roster page link to new /roster/[userId] detail page
- StudentDetailView: last login, accommodations, assignment breakdown cards (missing/late/complete etc.)
- Clicking a card expands assignment list with links to grading

Users route rename:
- /people → /users (enrollment management page)
- /people/[userId] → /roster/[userId] (student detail, keeps Roster active in sidebar)
- Old /people routes redirect to new URLs

Security:
- HtmlContent: DOMPurify sanitization before dangerouslySetInnerHTML
- grade-actions: instructor/admin role check on saveGrade and markCompleteNoSubmission
- student-preview: verify caller is instructor/admin before returning true
- course duplicate API: non-admins can only duplicate their own courses
- people-actions updateUserRole: instructor/admin gate; only admins can assign admin role

Docs: updated README, SCHEMA, INSTRUCTOR_ONBOARDING, STUDENT_GUIDE, ACCESSIBILITY

- App.tsx v4: single Route state machine, airtight loading gate, checks onboarding_status not stage
- ConnectTools v3: dynamic app list from Composio API, priority sorting, fallback to hardcoded list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 5 correctness/design issues across ElevenLabs UI blocks

Fix 1 — VoiceChatBar signed URL timing: was fetching URL in onConnect
(fires after session starts); now uses useAdminSignedUrl data directly
(auto-fetched on mount) and calls refetchSignedUrl() on disconnect to
pre-cache the URL for the next session

Fix 2 — VoiceChatBar error visibility: connection errors were only
console.error'd; now stored in errorMessage state and shown in the
empty-state title/description inside the chat area

Fix 3 — Speaker globalAudioState: removed module-level mutable object
that leaked state across remounts and broke with multiple instances;
replaced with audioStateRef = useRef() in SpeakerControls, threaded
through SpeakerOrbsSection and SpeakerOrb as stateRef prop

Fix 4 — VoiceLab UX: add mic-required indicator (small mic icon) on
voice tabs (Orb, Bar, Transcriber); fix Transcriber tab container
min-height so it doesn't collapse

Fix 5 — VoiceChatOrb stale signedUrl guard: removed !signedUrl from
button disabled condition; startConversation always refetches a fresh
URL before connecting so the stale cache value was incorrectly blocking
reconnects

commit.message:
Improve UX: transparent nav, search filter, topic grid, hazard retry

- Make nav bar transparent to show animated background through headers
- Replace search filter pills with toolbar menu button
- Redesign TopicsView with compact 8-column question number grid
- Redesign MockExamTab fixed exam sets as 2-column list layout
- Add retry button for hazard perception test results
- Improve HazardTestView with processing state, progress counter, score animation
- Fix double-render bug in HazardTestView by removing withAnimation on index changes
- Simplify AnimatedBackground (fewer orbs, blur layer, drawingGroup)
- Clean up redundant condition in HazardTestView bottom nav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: redesign inventory-previewer as responsive CSS grid card layout

- Replace table view with CSS Grid using repeat(--cols, 1fr)
- Each card: 1:1 image, model, color, balance, tags
- New bindable props: columns, fontSize, showSku, showAddButton, showGridLines
- Add tags field to action:add_item event payload
- Search now includes tags field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add bottom margin after authors when no venue is present

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add frontend CI job and commit .env.local.example

- New frontend job in ci.yml: pnpm install, oxlint, tsc --noEmit, pnpm build
  (Node 22 + pnpm, both actions SHA-pinned)
- Unblock frontend/.env.local.example from .gitignore with !.env*.example negation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct search input left padding to avoid icon overlap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update e_logo.png across platform and add favicon to maintenance page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand wannado requirements to REQ-041

- Add isolated user scope, password management (REQ-036 to REQ-038)
- Add overdue highlighting, quick-add, dashboard (REQ-039 to REQ-041)
- Clarify REQ-020 (roles), REQ-034/035 (PostgreSQL, container setup)
- Extend glossary with Dashboard, Quick-Add, Overdue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix description apply detection and simplify concise description

Description apply button was reverting to purple after save because
the appended metadata (Size, Artist, Condition) made product.bodyHtml
differ from the editor content. Now uses startsWith comparison to
account for appended metadata.

Concise description: when it exists in Shopify, shows expandable
text with Shopify indicator. When not present, shows Apply button.
Removes confusing double-green-link state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: vintage-poster-gallery
repository.description: Image analyzer

commit.message:
feat: 添加侧边栏公司统计功能

- 在侧边栏 OfferBox 标题下方新增"收集的公司"统计区域
- 自动统计招聘信息库中所有公司及其职位数量
- 按公司名称排序显示，点击可跳转到招聘信息库
- 优化侧边栏导航按钮宽度，统一"投递记录"和"招聘信息库"按钮大小
- 支持滚动查看，最多显示 200px 高度的公司列表
- 新增精美的渐变背景和悬停效果

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
